replicaCount.description: Number of Tarnished replicas. SQLite deployments must remain single-replica. Multiple replicas require PostgreSQL plus shared uploads storage.

image.description: Container image settings for the Tarnished application and migration init container.

tag.description: Container image tag. If empty, the chart appVersion is used.

pullPolicy.description: Kubernetes image pull policy for the Tarnished image.

imagePullSecrets.description: List of image pull secrets to attach to the Tarnished pod.

nameOverride.description: Partial override for the generated chart name.

fullnameOverride.description: Full override for the generated release name.

serviceAccount.description: ServiceAccount configuration for the Tarnished workload.

create.description: Create a dedicated ServiceAccount for Tarnished.

automount.description: Mount Kubernetes API credentials into the pod. Leave false unless Tarnished must call the Kubernetes API.

name.description: Existing ServiceAccount name to use instead of creating one.

podAnnotations.description: Annotations applied to the Tarnished pod template.

podLabels.description: Additional labels applied to the Tarnished pod template.

podSecurityContext.description: Pod security context for the Tarnished workload.

securityContext.description: Container security context for the Tarnished app and migration init container.

type.description: Kubernetes Service type used to expose Tarnished.

ingress.description: Ingress configuration for exposing Tarnished at a hostname.

enabled.description: Enable an Ingress resource for Tarnished.

className.description: IngressClass name, such as nginx or traefik.

annotations.description: Annotations added to the Ingress resource.

host.description: Primary hostname for Tarnished when ingress is enabled.

paths.description: Ingress path rules to expose Tarnished.

tls.description: TLS settings for the Tarnished Ingress.

enabled.description: Enable TLS for the Tarnished Ingress.

secretName.description: TLS secret name used by the Ingress.

persistence.description: Persistent storage for Tarnished uploads and local app data.

enabled.description: Enable persistent storage for Tarnished data.

storageClass.description: StorageClass used for the chart-managed PVC. Leave empty to use the cluster default.

size.description: Requested size for the chart-managed PVC.

accessMode.description: Access mode for the chart-managed PVC. Multiple replicas require shared write access.

existingClaim.description: Existing PVC to use instead of creating a new one.

sharedAccess.description: Acknowledgement flag required when multiple replicas use an existing shared claim.

annotations.description: Annotations applied to the chart-managed PVC.

postgresql.description: External PostgreSQL settings. Enabling this switches Tarnished away from SQLite.

database.description: PostgreSQL database name used by Tarnished.

password.description: PostgreSQL password used when existingSecret is not set.

existingSecret.description: Existing Kubernetes Secret containing the PostgreSQL password.

existingSecretPasswordKey.description: Secret key name that stores the PostgreSQL password.

secretKey.description: SECRET_KEY configuration used for Tarnished JWT signing.

existingSecret.description: Existing Kubernetes Secret containing the Tarnished SECRET_KEY.

existingSecretKey.description: Secret key name that stores the Tarnished SECRET_KEY value.

env.description: Additional environment variables added directly to the Tarnished containers.

trustedHosts.description: Extra hostnames appended to Tarnished TrustedHostMiddleware configuration.

envFrom.description: Additional environment-variable sources imported from ConfigMaps or Secrets.

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the Tarnished app container.

initContainer.description: Configuration for the migration init container that runs database migrations before Tarnished starts.

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the migration init container.

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe for the Tarnished app container.

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe for the Tarnished app container.

startupProbe.description: Startup probe for the Tarnished app container.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector for scheduling Tarnished pods.

affinity.description: Affinity and anti-affinity rules for Tarnished pods.

cleanup.description: Optional CronJob that runs upload cleanup for orphaned CAS blobs.

schedule.description: Cron schedule used for the upload cleanup job.

timeZone.description: Time zone used by the cleanup CronJob. Requires Kubernetes support for the CronJob timeZone field.

mode.description: Cleanup mode. dry-run reports orphaned uploads; delete removes them.

successfulJobsHistoryLimit.description: Number of successful cleanup Jobs to keep in Kubernetes history.

failedJobsHistoryLimit.description: Number of failed cleanup Jobs to keep in Kubernetes history.

startingDeadlineSeconds.description: How long Kubernetes may delay a missed cleanup Job start before skipping it.

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the cleanup CronJob container.
